title: Loop Over Items node causes subsequent node to hang
symptom: After processing a large dataset in the Loop Over Items node, the next node spins indefinitely without completing.
not_this_if: Workflow completes successfully with smaller datasets (e.g., 6 items)
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node may struggle with large datasets, causing subsequent nodes to hang due to excessive processing time or resource limitations. This can be exacerbated by the execution settings and the overall complexity of the workflow.
fix_steps: Change the execution action in the Loop Over Items node to call another workflow.
Return only the necessary values from the called workflow.
Consider storing intermediate results in a database to reduce data load.
agent_instruction: Modify the Loop Over Items node to call another workflow and return only essential data.
